blocks.content: The crater where Son Yoo-jung had crashed was littered with mangled corpses, torn flesh strewn everywhere.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Hi-Hiiik!
With each swing of the crimson club, severed arms and legs flew into the air.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: What are these things?
Son Yoo-jung, having defeated all the heinous criminals of hell, tilted her head in confusion as she surveyed her surroundings.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Ugh… Please, please stop…
The grotesque remains of what once resembled human forms squirmed and crawled across the ground.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Why aren't you guys dying?
Richela, now reduced to only a face, screamed in despair over the grim future that lay ahead.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: We can't die!
Son Yoo-jung grabbed Richela's hair, lifting his face up to meet her gaze.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Why can't you die?
Speaking calmly to a disembodied head, Richela finally realized something.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: She"s not normal. She"s completely insane.
For those who had escaped purification, the worst possible fate was having their heads smashed in.
It wasn't confirmed, but rumor had it that if that happened, it would feel like being buried alive forever.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Please stop. Just leave us alone. I'm begging you.
Son Yoo-jung repeated her question.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: I asked why you can't die.
After Richela explained everything he knew, Son Yoo-jung nodded.
Hmph, purification, huh?
She ran her fingers over the broken collar-like object, the cursed chain around her neck.
Grabbing the curled edge that spiraled upward, she tugged at it with all her might, but it didn't budge.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Damn it.
From past experience, she knew that even if she destroyed her body, she wouldn't be able to remove it.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Why did that damn Buddha do this? There"s no Buddha here in hell.
Only someone who had attained a high level of spiritual enlightenment could shrink the chain through a special incantation.
Even for the stone ape incarnation, Son Yoo-jung, the chain could easily crush her neck.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: I hate this.
Though it seemed unlikely that a monk would be present in a place swarming with wicked souls, the thought still bothered her.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Huh?
Snapping out of her thoughts, Son Yoo-jung noticed Richela staring at her.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: What are you looking at?

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Well, uh… You have a nice figure.
Son Yoo-jung burst out laughing.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Even with just a head left, that's what you're thinking? You're hilarious. Back where I came from, there were ghostly creatures that floated around with just their heads. I didn't expect to meet one of them here.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: … You"re the one who made me like this.
Regardless, the thought of rolling around as just a head made his vision go dark with despair.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: I"d rather be purified than live like this.
Just as that thought crossed his mind, a roaring wind carried the sound of burning flames from the distant sky.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Huh?
As Son Yoo-jung looked up, she saw something creeping through the air like black smoke.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: B-Black Chains!
At Richela's shout, the remaining criminals, still clinging to some semblance of their faces, began writhing in panic.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: They're here! Over here!
Since they were doomed to crawl here for eternity anyway, they figured they might as well take Son Yoo-jung down with them.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: You idiots! Why are you calling the Black Chains?!

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Shut up! Do you think cozying up to that woman will change your fate? We're all doomed together!
Everyone began shouting in unison.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: You're finished too! You'll be buried in the Wailing Wall and suffer forever! Hahaha… Aaargh!
In that instant, the Black Chains entered the crater and swiftly collected the bodies.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: My body! My body!
Tears streamed down Richela's face, though he felt fortunate just to have kept his head.
Three Black Chains hovered before Son Yoo-jung, exuding a heavy and oppressive aura.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Living corpses?
One of the captured criminals shouted.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Capture that woman too! She's incredibly fast! Grab her before she escapes—ugh!
The clanking of chains grew louder as the binding tightened, cutting off his consciousness.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: The thought that he could've ended up like them made Richela shiver in fear.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Uh, maybe we should run? Those guys are really dangerous. I've never seen them myself, but…
Even the most deranged of the senior criminals would tremble in fear at the mere mention of the Black Chains.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Who are you?
Even with her golden eyes that could perceive truth, she couldn't fully grasp what the Black Chains were.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: ... Are you Buddha's servants?
Upon spotting the cursed collar around her neck, the Black Chains realized why she lacked a karma chain.

blocks.speaker: The Black Chains
blocks.content: There must be a reason you were sent here. We won't question it.
The difference between Yahweh and Buddha was evident even in how the Black Chains addressed her.

blocks.speaker: The Black Chains
blocks.content: But the thing you hold in your hand belongs to this hell. Hand it over.
Terrified, Richela protested with all his might.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: No! Don't listen to them! They treat people like objects!
The Black Chains spoke.

blocks.speaker: The Black Chains
blocks.content: Most humans who enter this world eventually accept their fate and allow themselves to be purified. But those addicted to pleasure cannot forget its taste and reject purification.

blocks.speaker: The Black Chains
blocks.content: Their worldly attachments were too strong.

blocks.speaker: The Black Chains
blocks.content: Such people live by ignoring the rules of your world as well. They oppose Buddha's will. Handing them over to us is the right thing to do.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: No.
What the Black Chains didn't know was that Son Yoo-jung's nature leaned heavily toward chaos.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: I claimed this one first. It's a fun toy. I won't give it to you.
Though her words echoed the objectification they had criticized, Richela nodded vigorously with all the strength he could muster.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: … I see.
Realizing Buddha's true intentions, the Black Chains dissolved into smoke, filling the sky.
—You, who seek truth in hell, will never achieve the karma of saving others, no matter what you realize.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: I told you, I'm not interested.
The Black Chains merely disappeared into a black vortex in the distance.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: They… they're gone.
Richela trembled at the miraculous outcome.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: So, what now…
Richela's vision spun as Son Yoo-jung grabbed him again.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: Now, what should I do with you?
Her mischievous grin filled him with renewed dread.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: P-please spare me! No, better yet, throw me into the hellfire! Just end it already!
That sounds like a hassle. More importantly, I want to get rid of this thing. Know anything about it?
Son Yoo-jung scratched at the cursed collar, causing Richela's head to spin faster than ever before.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: I-I don't know exactly, but maybe you could find help in Laviette?
Laviette?

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: I heard that hell has many strange artifacts, and most of them are produced there. Perhaps one of their experts could…
His confidence wavered.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Maybe they can remove it… hopefully?
Hmph. Well, let's head there. If things work out, I might grant your wish too.
With that, she plucked a strand of hair and flung it into the air, creating a shimmering thread of light.
Though it resembled Shirone's materialization magic, it was simply another benefit of her lineage.
In an instant, Son Yoo-jung was fully clothed.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Was that… magic?
Something like that. Wearing clothes is annoying, but walking around naked causes even more trouble.
Noticing the blood dripping from Richela's severed neck, Son Yoo-jung tightened her left hand.
You need a little fixing too.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Huh? N-no, I'm fine—
Before he could finish, her molten-hot left hand seared the stump of his neck.
Kraaaah! Aaaaah!
The unexpected pain made Richela's eyes bulge, and his jaw gaped wide.
The smell of burning flesh filled the air.
Just before he lost consciousness, Yoo-jung finally pulled her hand away.

blocks.speaker: Son Yoo-jung
blocks.content: There, much cleaner.
Tears streamed down Richela's face as he despaired over becoming a complete, single-headed entity.
It's annoying to carry you around.
She created a sharp-capped chain, stabbed it into his neck, and wrapped it tightly around her waist so that he hung at her side.
All done! Now, let's head out. Which way?
As he dangled upside down, Richela pondered what sins he must have committed in his past life to deserve this.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: I"ll endure it… until purification.
Recalling the stories told by his seniors, Richela glanced around and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: If we can get to higher ground, you'll see that this region is the skeleton of a giant. If you head toward where the skull is, that's where Laviette is supposed to be.
Aha!
With a powerful crouch, Yoo-jung launched herself into the air, quickly leaving the ground far below.

blocks.speaker: Richela
blocks.content: Waaaaah!
As Richela's vision spun wildly, he saw the vast skeleton stretching all the way to the horizon.
The City of Magical Engineering, Laviette
Rian couldn't find any common features among the demons wandering the streets.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: As human emotions vary, so do the forms of demons. While there are distinct species like ogres and succubi, the range of forms is quite broad.

Hums, based on their genes, consider even an extra finger a mutation. But demons don't have mutations. Once a species is separated by the nature of magic, they are born randomly. So, some demons are monstrous...
Graaaah!
A demon with a monstrous face passed by, baring its teeth at Shirone.
...and some possess beauty that seems unreal.
A beautiful woman walking from the opposite direction winked at Shirone.
What are you up to?
In the next moment, a demon selling goods on the street knocked her down and stomped on her.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: Spit! Seems like she's lost her mind.
Feeling the gaze of a demon stabbing from behind, Shirone awkwardly smiled and continued.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That doesn't mean they're necessarily popular. It's a world where form isn't that important.
...I see.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Shirone, I have a real question.
Rian examined the numerous structures that made up the city, rather than the demons.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: How are you looking at this with a sane mind?
From the city gates, it was clear that all the structures somehow used humans.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's right.
It would be a lie to say it's not disgusting. But I've experienced it countless times while accepting Omega.
The time spent wandering was long.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: Hey, Yahweh!
A voice came from a stall selling furniture.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: How about buying this? I just got something you'd like.
It was in the shape of a person lying down, with its insides hollowed out like a filleted fish.
Huff! Huff!
As the demon tapped on the side, the face attached to it breathed.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: It's a whole piece, a whole piece. It's processed as a complete product. It doesn't rot easily because it keeps breathing.
In reality, it was like a piece of furniture carved from a whole log, not assembled.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: How about it? Want to buy one? I'll give you a good price. Huh?
Though the demon's mouth was smiling, the hostility in its eyes was like facing an enemy.
That was enough for Rian.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: I'll make it quietly.
As he gripped the handle of his large sword and turned to the merchant, Shirone stopped him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's okay. Though he talks like that, he won't attack me. It's just provocation.
The demon bared its fangs and spat out.

blocks.speaker: Demon
blocks.content: Die! Yahweh!
Spitting and growling, the veins in Rian's neck bulged.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: But it's still infuriating.
I'm the being demons hate the most. If you get this excited, you can't stay in the city.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Wanting to let Shirone rest for even a day, Rian calmed his anger.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shirone pointed to a restaurant sign.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: By the way, aren't you hungry? Let's eat something first. We need to find out where the duke lives.
I'm a bit peckish, but...

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: He was starving to the point of madness.

blocks.speaker: Rian
blocks.content: Haha, then let's try that restaurant. It's my first time going in too, but it should be edible.
Rian looked up at the sign.
Something was written in the demon's language, and a human arm was hanging, gesturing.
I hope it is.
